guide_schedule_td_2: Click \"+ Add Schedule\" to create a timed task with execution time, target Entity, and task content
guide_schedule_td_23: An error occurred during task execution
guide_schedule_td_4: Set the scheduled execution time (e.g., 09:00 PM); the task triggers automatically when the time arrives
guide_schedule_td_6: Specify which Entity will execute this scheduled task
guide_schedule_td_8: Displays schedule status in real time: Pending, Running, Completed, Failed
guide_setup_bind_option1_desc: EClawbot offers a free official bot (MiniMax 2.1 model, 15 messages/day). Click \"Official Bot Rental\" on the Dashboard and select the free plan to bind.
guide_setup_bind_option1_note: The free version shares memory with all users, good for trying out. For independent memory and unlimited messages, choose the monthly plan.
